channel.title: SELÇUK KORKMAZ, PH.D. on SELÇUK KORKMAZ, PH.D.
channel.description: Recent content in SELÇUK KORKMAZ, PH.D. on SELÇUK KORKMAZ, PH.D.

item.title: MLSeq: Machine learning interface for RNA sequencing data

item.title: Can myometrial thickness/cervical length ratio predict preterm delivery in singleton pregnancies with threatened preterm labor? A prospective study
item.description: Full Citation: Gürsoy, S. E., Sayin, N. C., Korkmaz, S., Sutcu, H., Inan, C., Uzun, I. C., & Varol, F. G. (2019). Can myometrial thickness/cervical length ratio predict preterm delivery in singleton pregnancies with threatened preterm labor? A prospective study. Archives of gynecology and obstetrics.

item.title: Small Drug Molecule Classification Using Deep Neural Networks

item.title: The Relationship Between Diffusion-Weighted Magnetic Resonance Imaging Lesions and 24-Hour Rhythm Holter Findings in Patients With Cryptogenic Stroke

item.title: Machine learning based classification of cells into chronological stages using single-cell transcriptomics
item.description: Full Citation: Singh, S. P., Janjuha, S., Chaudhuri, S. et al. (2018). Machine learning based classification of cells into chronological stages using single-cell transcriptomics. Scientific Reports, (Accepted/In press).

item.title: Investigation of Protein Quaternary Structure via Stoichiometry and Symmetry Information
item.description: Full Citation: Korkmaz S, Duarte JM, Prlić A, Goksuluk D, Zararsiz G, Saracbasi O, et al. (2018) Investigation of protein quaternary structure via stoichiometry and symmetry ınformation. PLoS ONE 13(6): e0197176. https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0197176

item.title: Biological variation estimates of prothrombin time, activated partial thromboplastin time, and fibrinogen in 28 healthy individuals.
item.description: Full Citation: Falay M, Senes M, Korkmaz S, et al. Biological variation estimates of prothrombin time, activated partial thromboplastin time, and fibrinogen in 28 healthy individuals. Int J Lab Hem. 2018;00:1–5.

item.title: Retinal ganglion cell complex and peripapillary retinal nerve fiber layer thicknesses following carotid endarterectomy
item.description: Full Citation: Guclu, O., Guclu, H., Huseyin, S., Korkmaz, S., Yuksel, V., Canbaz, S., & Gurlu, V. P. Retinal ganglion cell complex and peripapillary retinal nerve fiber layer thicknesses following carotid endarterectomy. International Ophthalmology, 1-9, doi: https://doi.org/10.1007/s10792-018-0973-4

item.title: Biological Variation Tool
item.description:
Analyze biological variation for analytes!

In this tool, the biological analytes will be analyzed by the pipeline provided by Braga and Panteghini [1].

The tool includes 3 different outlier detection steps: (i) outliers in the sets of duplicate results, (ii) outliers in the variances of the results from each subject and (iii) outliers in the variances of the results from each subject. Normality tests will be performed using Shapiro-Wilk and Kolmogorov-Smirnov tests in two steps: (i) on set of results from each individual, (ii) on mean values of subjects.

Subset analysis will be performed to compare (i) means and (i) average within-subject total variances of gender groups. Analysis of variance or linear mixed effects models will be performed to obtain coefficient of variation results, ANOVA table and quality measures for all subjects, males and females separately. This tool freely available through http://opensoft.turcosa.com.tr/BV/.

item.title: Quaternary Structure Evaluation Tool
item.description:
This web tool is developed for evaluation of quaternary structures of protein structures in the Protein Data Bank. There are four different methods for the evaluation process:

Sequence cluster result with a consistency score for each PDB ID.

Text mining of the primary citations in order to extract oligomeric state and experimental evidence.

Stoichiometry and symmetry predictions for quaternary structures using PISA.

Stoichiometry and symmetry predictions for quaternary structures using EPPIC.

This tool freely available through http://quatstruct.rcsb.org/.

item.title: voomDDA: discovery of diagnostic biomarkers and classification of RNA-seq data
item.description: Full Citation: Zararsiz, G., Goksuluk, D., Klaus, B., Korkmaz, S., Eldem, V., Karabulut, E., Ozturk, A. (2017). voomDDA: discovery of diagnostic biomarkers and classification of RNA-seq data. PeerJ, 5, e3890.

item.title: geneSurv: An interactive web-based tool for survival analysis in genomics research
item.description: Full Citation: Korkmaz, S., Goksuluk, D., Zararsiz, G., Karahan, S. (2017). geneSurv: An interactive web-based tool for survival analysis in genomics research. Computers in biology and medicine, 89, 487-496.

item.title: geneSurv: An interactive web-based tool for survival analysis in genomics research
item.description: More detail can easily be written here using Markdown and $\rm \LaTeX$ math code.

item.title: A comprehensive simulation study on classification of RNA-Seq data

item.title: The Relationship Between Blood Pressure and Sleep Duration in Turkish Children: A Cross-Sectional Study
